mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid( auction_id, bidder_id, amount, created_at ) VALUES ( #{auctionId}, #{bidderId}, #{amount}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id, bidder_id, amount, created_at FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY amount DESC, created_at LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1

choose.when: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT auction_id) FROM bid WHERE bidder_id = #{bidderId}

mapper.select: SELECT id, auction_id AS auctionId, bidder_id AS bidderId, amount, created_at AS createdAt FROM bid WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY created_at ${order}

SELECT DISTINCT a.id AS id, a.item_id AS itemId, a.winner_id AS winnerId, a.seller_id AS sellerId, a.type AS type, a.inspection_yn AS inspectionYn, a.status AS status, a.start_price AS startPrice, a.bid_unit AS bidUnit, a.vickrey_price AS vickreyPrice, a.bid_count AS bidCount, a.buy_now_price AS buyNowPrice, a.wish_count AS wishCount, a.start_date AS startDate, a.end_date AS endDate, a.cancel_date AS cancelDate, a.winner_price AS winnerPrice, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM auction a INNER JOIN bid b ON a.id = b.auction_id WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId};
SELECT DISTINCT b.auction_id FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_id = a.id WHERE b.bidder_id = #{memberId} AND a.status = 'ON_GOING'
SELECT b.bidder_id FROM bid b WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY b.amount DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT b.id, b.auction_id, b.bidder_id, b.amount FROM bid b JOIN member m ON b.bidder_id = m.id WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY b.amount DESC LIMIT 2
